master_row.title: Stability Threshold at the TZP
master_row.canonical_statement: When coherence is locally broken, frictional drag and inertia appear; the region acquires a finite signal propagation speed ccc and experiences sequential states---effectively, time begins.
master_row.formation_note: Documented in the source as an inequality / bound.
master_row.dictionary: When coherence is locally broken, frictional drag and inertia appear; the region acquires a finite signal propagation speed (c) and experiences sequential states—effectively, time begins【952647870353647†L113-L134】.
